creator: lx@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does not build for me:

===>  Extracting for amarokFS-0.5
=> MD5 Checksum OK for 52641-amarokFS-0.5.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for 52641-amarokFS-0.5.tar.gz.
/usr/bin/sed -i.bak -e 's|/usr/share/icons/amarokFS.png|amarokFS|'  /tmp/test/amarokFS/work/amarokFS-0.5/amarokFS.desktop
===>  Patching for amarokFS-0.5
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for amarokFS-0.5
cd /tmp/test/amarokFS/work/amarokFS-0.5 && /usr/local/bin/qmake -o Makefile amarokFS-xml.pro
QMAKESPEC has not been set, so configuration cannot be deduced.
Error processing project file: /tmp/test/amarokFS/work/amarokFS-0.5/amarokFS-xml.pro
*** Error code 2

Stop in /tmp/test/amarokFS.
